## [00:00 - 01:51]

In this section, we're going to be looking at your brand. Now why is this important? Well, when we talk about branding, what we're talking about is your authority online and essentially the story that you put out there so that people can know, like and trust you. If you're going to be charging the prices that you want to be charging and offering services to business, you're likely going to find that most people are going to want to do their due diligence on you. And also remember that people buy from people, not necessarily from products or feature-based solutions. So what you want to do is look at what is the story that you have and how does it connect to the specific audience that you want to be working with so that you only attract the kind of people in your business that you actually want to work for. Why is that important? Because if you hate the people you work with, you're going to hate your business and you'll sabotage the whole thing. So branding is essentially, it's a foundational thing to everything that you do. Some of the strategies we're going to be exploring in here include getting yourself published online through publications. Now don't get flustered by that. I know it can sound daunting, but we've got a really simple formula that you can follow that will help you to get yourself out there in a really powerful way. You're also going to explore your online presence and your content strategies so that you know what kind of stuff should I be putting out there and how do I even tell my story. That can be the hardest thing for some people is even knowing what will connect to the people that you want to work with. So we're looking at branding in this section and at the end of this, you should have a clear game plan on how to build the foundations for something that can handle an empire. I'll see you guys in there.
